meta.description: Receives a website/contact-form submission, enriches & qualifies the lead against the Lean-AI ICP with an AI step, records it, and sends a scheduling link for a 30-minute fit call. Configure credentials (HTTP/AI, email, CRM/Sheet) before activating. Human-in-the-loop: the fit call itself.

parameters.subject: Let's find what's possible — book your Lean-AI fit call
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $('Normalize Fields').item.json.name }},

Thank you for reaching out to Lean-AI. Based on what you shared, it sounds like there may be a process worth fixing.

Let's spend 30 minutes on it — no pressure. Book a time that suits you here: [SCHEDULING LINK]

Beforehand, it helps to think about: which single process costs your team the most time each week?

Speak soon,
Lean-AI — the operating partner for the AI era
hello@lean-ai.com

parameters.subject: Thank you from Lean-AI
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $('Normalize Fields').item.json.name }},

Thank you for getting in touch. From what you've shared, we may not be the right fit right now — but here are a couple of resources that might help: [LINKS].

If things change, we'd be glad to talk.

Lean-AI
hello@lean-ai.com

parameters.content:
## Setup
1. Set the Webhook URL as your contact form's POST endpoint (fields: name, email, company, message).
2. Add Anthropic (or other LLM) HTTP header auth credential.
3. Add SMTP credential for hello@lean-ai.com.
4. Replace [SCHEDULING LINK] and [LINKS].
5. Optionally append a 'Create CRM Record' node after Parse Qualification.

Human-in-the-loop: the fit call. The AI only triages.
